title: No Data in Board View Feature Preview

posts.author: igsmr (Igor)
posts.cookedHtml: I am seeing the newer version of the UI was released in the features preview of app development. Particularly, I am referring to the preview of the Board View app. Before, while enabling a published or a custom url (tunnel) view, the board access could be given to the app, so the context is hydrated with the board data. The latest version of UI has no such option anymore, thus it became impossible to preview board view app that is dependent on the boards data. Can you fix this or provide instructions to overcome this issues?
